### Registration in the High Court of an order registered in a magistrates' court E+W


F63 32.18. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

### Variation or discharge of an order registered in [ F64 the family court – procedure in the High Court ] E+W


32.19. —(1) This rule applies where a maintenance order is registered in [ F65 the family court ] under Part 1 of the 1958 Act.


(2) If the court which made the order makes an order varying or discharging that order the court officer [ F66 of the High Court ] must send a certified copy of the order of variation or discharge to [ F67 the family court ] .

metadata.title: Part 32 — Registration and Enforcement of Orders
